title: sideritis cretica subsp. spicata
intro: Sideritis cretica subsp. spicata is a subspecies of the Sideritis cretica plant, commonly known as Greek mountain tea, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis cretica subsp. spicata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant protection, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Sideritis cretica subsp. spicata is typically consumed as a tea, either on its own or blended with other herbs, and is also used in the form of capsules or tinctures.
